'''lazhuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chacarero|chacarero]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chacarero|chacarero]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lazhuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læzhihith|læzhihith]] || [[word:læzhihij|læzhihij]] || [[word:læzhihish|læzhihish]] || [[word:læzhihi|læzhihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lazhuzhuhuth|lazhuzhuhuth]] || [[word:lazhuzhuhuj|lazhuzhuhuj]] || [[word:lazhuzhuhush|lazhuzhuhush]] || [[word:lazhuzhuhu|lazhuzhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lazhuhuth|lazhuhuth]] || [[word:lazhuhuj|lazhuhuj]] || [[word:lazhuhush|lazhuhush]] || [[word:lazhuhu|lazhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lazhufhuth|lazhufhuth]] || [[word:lazhufhuj|lazhufhuj]] || [[word:lazhufhush|lazhufhush]] || [[word:lazhufhuf|lazhufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lazhuhuthu|lazhuhuthu]] || [[word:lazhuhuju|lazhuhuju]] || [[word:lazhuhushu|lazhuhushu]] || [[word:lazhuhuku|lazhuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lazhuhuth|lazhuhuth]] || [[word:lazhuhuj|lazhuhuj]] || [[word:lazhuhush|lazhuhush]] || [[word:lazhuhu|lazhuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lazhuhuthul|lazhuhuthul]] || [[word:lazhuhujul|lazhuhujul]] || [[word:lazhuhushul|lazhuhushul]] || [[word:lazhuhukul|lazhuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lazhuhuthuthu|lazhuhuthuthu]] || [[word:lazhuhujuju|lazhuhujuju]] || [[word:lazhuhushushu|lazhuhushushu]] || [[word:lazhuhuku|lazhuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lazhuhuthun|lazhuhuthun]] || [[word:lazhuhujun|lazhuhujun]] || [[word:lazhuhushun|lazhuhushun]] || [[word:lazhuhukun|lazhuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lazhuhuthuoro|lazhuhuthuoro]] || [[word:lazhuhujuoro|lazhuhujuoro]] || [[word:lazhuhushuoro|lazhuhushuoro]] || [[word:lazhuhukuoro|lazhuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
